name: 6th Street Park
description: 6th Street Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kalamazoo, MI. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Borgess Health And Fitness Center
description: Borgess Health And Fitness Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kalamazoo, MI. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Charles & Lynn Zhang Portage Senior Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Charles & Lynn Zhang Portage Senior Community Center in Portage, MI! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, food, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

name: Crane Park
description: Crane Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kalamazoo, MI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Frays Park
description: Come play pickleball at Frays Park in Kalamazoo, MI! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Friendly Pickle
description: Friendly Pickle is a new pickleball club opening in late June 2025. We have eight (8) indoor championship size courts (34x65) with two spacious lounge areas for hanging out with friends, family, or colleagues.
fees: Fee required — Two annual memberships ($497 and $597) and daily Visitors starting at $10 per play.

name: Kalamazoo Fitness and Wellness center
description: Kalamazoo Fitness and Wellness center is a place to play pickleball in Kalamazoo, MI. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Players have access to locker rooms and restrooms.

name: Kindleberger Park
description: Come play pickleball at Kindleberger Park in Parchment, MI! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Lakeview Park
description: Come play pickleball at Lakeview Park in Portage, MI! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Next Level Sports Center
description: Our climate-controlled indoor pickleball courts offer the perfect environment for players of all levels. Featuring top-tier surfaces designed for performance and safety, our facility ensures a consistent playing experience—rain or shine. Whether you're here for a casual game or competitive league play, our courts are built to help you play your best.

name: Oakland Drive Park
description: Oakland Drive Park is a place to play pickleball in Portage, MI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Portage Branch YMCA
description: Portage Branch YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Portage, MI. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Ramona Park
description: Ramona Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Portage, MI. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Richland Township Office/Fire Station
description: Richland Township Office/Fire Station is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Richland, MI. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: The Courthouse Athletic Center of Kalamazoo
description: The Courthouse Athletic Center of Kalamazoo is a place to play pickleball in Portage, MI. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: The Point
description: Come play pickleball at The Point in Kalamazoo, MI! There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
hours: M-F 8 AM - 8 PM Sat: 8 AM - 12 PM Sat. Rentals 12 PM - 6 PM © 2025 All Rights Reserved.

description: Come play pickleball at The Salvation Army of Kalamazoo in Kalamazoo, MI! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: West Hills Athletic Club
description: West Hills Athletic Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kalamazoo, MI. There are 14 hard courts. 13 are indoors and 1 is outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.
